description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a main house, a detached garage, and a landscaped yard. The main building features a gable roof with dark shingles, brick exterior walls, and multiple windows distributed across all sides. The property includes a paved driveway leading to the garage, a front walkway, and a backyard with trees, shrubs, and a small pool or pond. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch with steps, and the landscaping is well-maintained with flowering bushes and mature trees. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the overall style is reminiscent of a classic suburban ranch bungalow. The setting suggests a comfortable residential environment suitable for a family.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a gable roof, detached garage, landscaped yard, and symmetrical window arrangement. Features include a front porch, paved driveway, and mature trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main house, detached garage, front yard, and backyard landscaping with trees and a pool.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, front porch, driveway, and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length of the house, garage, and backyard with mature trees and a pool.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backyard, pool, and the back facade of the bungalow with visible windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
